name: Sharp Apple
description: « An open source project from Apple that generates a photorealistic 3D representation from a single photo in less than a second on a GPU. You can produce a 3D view of the captured scene and navigate around it with high-resolution rendering in real time

name: Photo Editor AI
description: « Edit and enhance your photos directly in your browser (no registration required). Perform specific edits such as background removal, targeted retouching, text replacement in an image, or style transfer

name: T5Gemma 2
description: « A family of open-source encoder-decoder models with 2 to 9 billion parameters, based on Gemma 2, with higher inference efficiency than decoder-only models. Available on Hugging Face, Kaggle, and Vertex AI

name: Seedance 1.5 pro
description: « Create cinematic videos in 1080p with natively synchronized audio from text or images. With sophisticated camera movements (long tracking shots, Hitchcock-style zooms), precise lip-syncing, contextual understanding of the narrative, and facial expressions

name: Gemini 3 Flash
description: « Enjoy professional-level intelligence with extreme speed and efficiency (and at a reduced cost). This model uses 30% fewer tokens and is very good at agentic coding

name: GPT Image 1.5
description: « Generate and edit your images directly in ChatGPT. This model is up to 4× faster and preserves essential details such as facial features. Benefit from better instruction tracking, increased visual consistency, and a dedicated creative studio-style interface.

name: Aimy Ads
description: « Launch and manage your advertising campaigns on Google, Meta, TikTok, etc. Use an AI tool that plans, executes, optimizes, and analyzes your campaigns without requiring media buying expertise.

name: ClickUp Agents
description: « Automate your work with AI agents that answer questions, generate weekly reports, and provide real-time insights. Benefit from integrations with Google Drive, GitHub, Salesforce, and over 20 other applications.

name: Rosie AI
description: « An on-call operator available day and night who takes your calls, answers questions, filters spam, and captures key information. This AI can even schedule appointments for you

name: Disco Google
description: « Experience a new way of browsing with GenTabs, an AI that transforms your open tabs into personalized web applications (based on your goal). Create SEO workflows, custom dashboards, or interactive tools from your browsing context.

name: Lip Sync Studio
description: « Don't let out-of-sync dubbing ruin your content. This tool automatically synchronizes the lips of any character, human, animal, or 3D avatar, with your audio track. Also works for multilingual dubbing

name: Dechecker
description: « A text checker that analyzes writing style to identify passages that may have been automatically generated by AI and helps you make your writing more natural and credible

name: Syllaby.io
description: « Create faceless videos with AI avatars and voices. This AI can write the script and generate a complete video from a simple idea. You can then schedule publication on multiple social networks from an integrated calendar
